name: Mini Shell Bacon and Pea Pasta

ingredients.item: smoked streaky bacon or pancetta, diced
Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

method: In a skillet, gently cook bacon for 2-3 minutes, stirring. Add in pasta, onion, garlic, olive oil, salt, pepper, peas and
Over medium heat, bring to a boil. Boil, frequently stirring until pasta is al dente and water has nearly evaporated,
about 15 minutes. Add the mascarpone cheese and dill and stir.
A fun, easy, and healthy recipe for a macaroni and cheese dish.
Delicious, even the kids will love!
Many food recipes call for chicken or bacon. You can keep this recipe vegetarian by using vegetarian cheese and
adding vegetables such as broccoli to the mix.
This recipe is great if you're looking for a quick dinner or a meal that both adults and children enjoy.
